value.found_quote: Antigravity supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), a standard that allows the editor to securely connect to your local tools, databases, and external services.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Antigravity's MCP Integration, confirming support for connecting the editor to local tools, databases, and external services. It also documents both local process (stdio transport via `command`) and remote host (Streamable HTTP via `serverUrl`) configurations, matching all aspects of the claim. The page presents the feature as currently available with a built-in MCP Store.
